Communication.title: Netflix, in a First, Plans Full Theatrical Release for ‘Narnia'
Communication.excerpt: Theater owners and filmmakers have long pushed for the entertainment giant to give its movies a Hollywood-style release in cinemas.

Communication.title: Why These 3 Red Hot Tech Stocks Keep Climbing
Communication.excerpt: Several stocks have seen increased interest as of late, including Micron MU, Alphabet GOOGL, and SanDisk SNDK. Given the recent spike in interest, let's take a closer look at how each presently stacks up and what's been driving the positivity behind each.

Communication.title: Alphabet Takes the Spotlight Among Mag 7 Hyperscalers
Communication.excerpt: At a pivotal moment, when the AI boom is being defined by the hyperscale race, Alphabet's cloud growth was dramatically stronger than Microsoft's and Amazon's.

Communication.title: Meta buys robotic startup to bolster its humanoid AI ambitions
Communication.excerpt: Meta has acquired humanoid robotics startup Assured Robot Intelligence for an undisclosed sum, the social media giant said.
